Interface ILocatorWorkspace

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members for managing the locators in the locator workspace.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AE5A3A08-F756-11D2-9F4F-00C04F8ED1C4")]
public interface ILocatorWorkspace
